req.title: Biller registration
req.statement: A customer shall register a biller only after a 24-hour hold; withdrawals to new billers shall be deferred.

telemetry.raw_response_head:
```python
"""
Pytest tests for the 24-hour biller registration hold requirement.

Requirement:
    A customer shall register a biller only after a 24-hour hold;
    withdrawals to new billers shall be deferred until the hold period has elapsed.
"""

import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models (stubs – replace with your actual imports)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class BillerStatus(str, Enum):
    PENDING = "pending"       # within the 24-hour hold window
    ACTIVE = "active"         # hold period elapsed; withdrawals allowed
    SUSPENDED = "suspended"


class WithdrawalStatus(str, Enum):
    DEFERRED = "deferred"     # biller still in hold period
    PROCESSED = "processed"
    FAILED = "failed"


@dataclass
class Biller:
    biller_id: str
    customer_id: str
    name: str
    account_number: str
    registered_at: datetime
    status: BillerStatus = BillerStatus.PENDING

    HOLD_PERIOD = timedelta(hours=24)

    @property
    def hold_expires_at(self) -> datetime:
        return self.registered_at + self.HOLD_PERIOD

    def is_hold_active(self, now: Optional[datetime] = None) -> bool:
        now = now or datetime.now(tz=timezone.utc)
        return now < self.hold_expires_at

    def activate_if_eligible(self, now: Optional[datetime] = None) -> bool:
        """Transition to ACTIVE when the hold has elapsed. Returns True if activated."""
        if not self.is_hold_active(now):
            self.status = BillerStatus.ACTIVE
            return True
        return False


@dataclass
class Withdrawal:
    withdrawal_id: str
    customer_id: str
    biller_id: str
    amount: float
    requested_at: datetime
    status: WithdrawalStatus = WithdrawalStatus.DEFERRED
    processed_at: Optional[datetime] = None


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Service layer (stubs – replace with your actual imports)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class BillerRegistrationError(Exception):
    pass


class WithdrawalError(Exception):
    pass


class BillerService:
    def __init__(self, biller_repository, clock=None):
        self._repo = biller_repository
        self._clock = clock or (lambda: datetime.now(tz=timezone.utc))

    def register_biller(self, customer_id: str, biller_id: str,
                        name: str, account_number: str) -> Biller:
        now = self._clock()
        biller = Biller(
            biller_id=biller_id,
            customer_id=customer_id,
            name=name,
            account_number=account_number,
            registered_at=now,
            status=BillerStatus.PENDING,
        )
        self._repo.save(biller)
        return biller

    def get_biller(self, biller_id: str) -> Biller:
        return self._repo.get(biller_id)

    def refresh_biller_status(self, biller_id: str) -> Biller:
        biller = self._repo.get(biller_id)
        biller.activate_if_eligible(self._clock())
        self._repo.save(biller)
        return biller


class WithdrawalService:
    def __init__(self, biller_service: BillerService,
                 withdrawal_repository, clock=None):
        self._biller_svc = biller_service
        self._repo = withdrawal_repository
        self._clock = clock or (lambda: datetime.now(tz=timezone.utc))

    def request_withdrawal(self, customer_id: str, biller_id: str,
                           amount: float, withdrawal_id: str) -> Withdrawal:
        if amount <= 0:
            raise WithdrawalError("Amount must be positive.")

        biller = self._biller_svc.get_biller(biller_id)

        if biller.customer_id != customer_id:
